caption: A person's hands hold a sports trading card featuring a basketball player in a black jersey against a dark, patterned background. The card displays the text "PITCH BLACK" at the top and "OBSIDIAN" at the bottom. In the background, a red and black surface features the white text "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.com". The surroundings include smaller inset screens showing a man with a beard wearing a black jacket. As the sequence progresses, the person's fingers shift their grip on the card, tilting it to catch the light. This movement reveals a vibrant, rainbow-like holographic shimmer that streaks across the surface of the card, shifting from green and blue to red and orange. The person continues to manipulate the card to showcase these reflective properties before the scene concludes.
